title: festuca ovina subvar. curvula
intro: Festuca ovina subvar. curvula, also known as curvula sheeps fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of curvula sheeps fescue include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Curvula sheeps fescue can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
